languages.text: {n}Ведка протягивает руку, но резко встряхивает головой и опускает ее.{/n} "Бог-Император свидетель, я очень хочу прочитать эти записи. Но давайте оставим их у вас до присяги. Думаю, во время принесения клятв они вам еще пригодятся".

{n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "As the God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us leave them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they will serve you well during the swearing of the oaths."
languages.original_text: {n}Ведка протягивает руку, но резко встряхивает головой и опускает ее.{/n} "Бог-Император свидетель, я очень хочу прочитать эти записи. Но давайте оставим их у вас до присяги. Думаю, во время принесения клятв они вам еще пригодятся".

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "The God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us keep them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they may serve you well during the swearing of the vows."

{n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "The God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us keep them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they may serve you well during the swearing of the vows."

{n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "As the God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us leave them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they will serve you well during the swearing of the oaths."

{n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "As the God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us leave them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they will serve you well during the swearing of the oaths."

{n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "As the God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us leave them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they will serve you well during the swearing of the oaths."

languages.text: {n}薇德卡伸出一只手，旋即猛地摇了摇头，把手放了下去。{/n}“神皇为证，我真的很想读一读那些日志。不过还是先放在您那里，等到誓言仪式再说吧。在立誓时，它或许会派上大用场。”
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "As the God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us leave them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they will serve you well during the swearing of the oaths."

traits.locale_text: {n}薇德卡伸出一只手，旋即猛地摇了摇头，把手放了下去。{/n}“神皇为证，我真的很想读一读那些日志。不过还是先放在您那里，等到誓言仪式再说吧。在立誓时，它或许会派上大用场。”

languages.text: {n}Vedka bir elini uzatıyor, sonra aniden başını sallayıp elini indiriyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator şahidim olsun ki o kayıtları okumayı çok isterim. Fakat yemin törenine kadar sizde kalsınlar. Yemin töreninde işinize yarayacaklarına inanıyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "As the God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us leave them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they will serve you well during the swearing of the oaths."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka bir elini uzatıyor, sonra aniden başını sallayıp elini indiriyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator şahidim olsun ki o kayıtları okumayı çok isterim. Fakat yemin törenine kadar sizde kalsınlar. Yemin töreninde işinize yarayacaklarına inanıyorum."

languages.text: {n}Vedka tend la main, mais la laisse retomber immédiatement en secouant vivement la tête.{/n} « L'Empereur-Dieu m'en est témoin, je meurs d'envie de lire ces journaux, mais il vaut mieux que vous les gardiez jusqu'au renouvellement du serment. Quelque chose me dit qu'ils vous seront très utiles à ce moment. »
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "As the God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us leave them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they will serve you well during the swearing of the oaths."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka tend la main, mais la laisse retomber immédiatement en secouant vivement la tête.{/n} « L'Empereur-Dieu m'en est témoin, je meurs d'envie de lire ces journaux, mais il vaut mieux que vous les gardiez jusqu'au renouvellement du serment. Quelque chose me dit qu'ils vous seront très utiles à ce moment. »

languages.text: {n}Vedka extiende la mano, luego niega bruscamente con la cabeza y la deja caer.{/n} «Al Dios Emperador pongo por testigo de que quiero leer esos registros. Pero por el momento, quédeselos hasta que se preste el juramento. Tengo la impresión de que le serán útiles para ello».
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "As the God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us leave them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they will serve you well during the swearing of the oaths."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka extiende la mano, luego niega bruscamente con la cabeza y la deja caer.{/n} «Al Dios Emperador pongo por testigo de que quiero leer esos registros. Pero por el momento, quédeselos hasta que se preste el juramento. Tengo la impresión de que le serán útiles para ello».

languages.text: {n}Vedka streckt eine Hand aus, schüttelt den Kopf und lässt sie wieder sinken.{/n} "Der Gottimperator ist mein Zeuge, ich würde diese Aufzeichnungen sehr gerne lesen. Aber behaltet sie bis zur Eidesleistung. Ich denke, sie werden Euch während des Gelöbnisses gute Dienste leisten."
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "As the God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us leave them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they will serve you well during the swearing of the oaths."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka streckt eine Hand aus, schüttelt den Kopf und lässt sie wieder sinken.{/n} "Der Gottimperator ist mein Zeuge, ich würde diese Aufzeichnungen sehr gerne lesen. Aber behaltet sie bis zur Eidesleistung. Ich denke, sie werden Euch während des Gelöbnisses gute Dienste leisten."

languages.text: {n}ヴェドカは手を差し伸べ、それを急いで引き上げて首を振る。{/n}「神帝に誓う、私はそのログを読むことを強く望みます。しかし、誓いの儀式までには、あなたに預けておきましょう。誓いの儀式には、きっと役立つでしょう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka reaches out a hand, then sharply shakes her head and lets it fall.{/n} "As the God-Emperor is my witness, I very much wish to read those logs. But let us leave them with you until the oath-taking. I suspect they will serve you well during the swearing of the oaths."

traits.locale_text: {n}ヴェドカは手を差し伸べ、それを急いで引き上げて首を振る。{/n}「神帝に誓う、私はそのログを読むことを強く望みます。しかし、誓いの儀式までには、あなたに預けておきましょう。誓いの儀式には、きっと役立つでしょう。」
